With commands, provider cleanups compose into the build function's
cleanup result; the wrapper defers it for the command's lifetime.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

type DB struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewDB() (*DB, func(), error) { db := &DB{}; return db, func() {}, nil }

type Audit struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewAudit(db *DB) (*Audit, error) { return &Audit{}, nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
func Ping(ctx cli.Context, db *DB, a *Audit) error {
	return nil
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

	"app/shared"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	root := &cli.Command{
		Name: "app",
		Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
			{
				Name: "ping",
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					db, audit, cleanup, err := buildPing(ctx)
					if err != nil {
						return err
					}
					defer cleanup()
					return shared.Ping(ctx, db, audit)
				},
			},
		},
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}

func buildPing(ctx context.Context) (*shared.DB, *shared.Audit, func(), error) {
	// Providers
	sharedDB, sharedDBClose, err := shared.NewDB()
	if err != nil {
		return nil, nil, nil, err
	}
	sharedAudit, err := shared.NewAudit(sharedDB)
	if err != nil {
		if sharedDBClose != nil {
			sharedDBClose()
		}
		return nil, nil, nil, err
	}

	cleanup := func() {
		if sharedDBClose != nil {
			sharedDBClose()
		}
	}
	return sharedDB, sharedAudit, cleanup, nil
}
